records.m_Talk_ENG: Why did they build so many underground structures?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why did they build so many underground structures?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why did they build so many underground structures?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's like the whole place is one big secret passageway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's like the whole place is one big secret passageway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's like the whole place is one big secret passageway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Brother Ludwig! The underground is one of the most evil spiritually charged places.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Brother Ludwig! The underground is one of the most evil spiritually charged places.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Brother Ludwig! The underground is one of the most evil spiritually charged places.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Building facilities here naturally attracts evil spirits.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Building facilities here naturally attracts evil spirits.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Building facilities here naturally attracts evil spirits.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I highly recommend scheduling regular exorcism rituals through our monastery.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I highly recommend scheduling regular exorcism rituals through our monastery.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I highly recommend scheduling regular exorcism rituals through our monastery.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* I didn't realize my estate had so many problems.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* I didn't realize my estate had so many problems.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* I didn't realize my estate had so many problems.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's understandable. That's why I'm here to help, after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's understandable. That's why I'm here to help, after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's understandable. That's why I'm here to help, after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, it's not free.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, it's not free.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, it's not free.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on a moment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on a moment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on a moment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you doing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you doing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you doing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Setting up a warding circle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Setting up a warding circle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Setting up a warding circle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It works like a security alarm.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It works like a security alarm.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It works like a security alarm.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can nuns do things like that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can nuns do things like that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can nuns do things like that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fascinating. How does it work?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fascinating. How does it work?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fascinating. How does it work?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha, that's a secret of our monastery.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha, that's a secret of our monastery.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha, that's a secret of our monastery.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you have further questions, please contact the Valentinus Monastery.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you have further questions, please contact the Valentinus Monastery.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you have further questions, please contact the Valentinus Monastery.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... The scent seems to be leading this way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... The scent seems to be leading this way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... The scent seems to be leading this way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that I think about it, you mentioned smelling something foul earlier.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that I think about it, you mentioned smelling something foul earlier.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that I think about it, you mentioned smelling something foul earlier.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Interesting. Is that your ability?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Interesting. Is that your ability?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Interesting. Is that your ability?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Calling it an ability is a bit much.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Calling it an ability is a bit much.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Calling it an ability is a bit much.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Think of it as an aftereffect of my <color=#ffd34c>sickness</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Think of it as an aftereffect of my <color=#ffd34c>sickness</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Think of it as an aftereffect of my <color=#ffd34c>sickness</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A sickness...? How interesting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A sickness...? How interesting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A sickness...? How interesting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? There's a door here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? There's a door here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? There's a door here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Looks expensive. Does it lead to the mansion?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Looks expensive. Does it lead to the mansion?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Looks expensive. Does it lead to the mansion?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It does. That means the intruder has already made her way inside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It does. That means the intruder has already made her way inside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It does. That means the intruder has already made her way inside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How dare she... My ancestors' legacy...
records.m_Talk_DEU: How dare she... My ancestors' legacy...
records.m_Talk_FRA: How dare she... My ancestors' legacy...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down. It's not good for your health.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Calm down. It's not good for your health.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Calm down. It's not good for your health.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In times like these, I recommend a sip of our monastery's special holy water.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In times like these, I recommend a sip of our monastery's special holy water.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In times like these, I recommend a sip of our monastery's special holy water.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It'll lighten your body and refresh your spirit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It'll lighten your body and refresh your spirit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It'll lighten your body and refresh your spirit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Strangely enough, it tastes like an energy drink... but quite invigorating.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Strangely enough, it tastes like an energy drink... but quite invigorating.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Strangely enough, it tastes like an energy drink... but quite invigorating.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha, well, something like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha, well, something like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha, well, something like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right, opening the door.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right, opening the door.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right, opening the door.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Huh? What... is this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Huh? What... is this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Huh? What... is this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why... does it smell like rot...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why... does it smell like rot...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why... does it smell like rot...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look at the moon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look at the moon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look at the moon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Corruption alert lifted.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Corruption alert lifted.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Corruption alert lifted.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Open the door and step outside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Open the door and step outside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Open the door and step outside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look up at the sky.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look up at the sky.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look up at the sky.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>NOW.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>NOW.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>NOW.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... My body... it's burning...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... My body... it's burning...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... My body... it's burning...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's happening?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's happening?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's happening?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Krrgh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Krrgh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Krrgh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: LUCIA!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: LUCIA!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: LUCIA!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: KHAAGH...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: KHAAGH...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: KHAAGH...!
